OfferSpec defines the desired state of Offer.

| `description` | Description of the Offer | `string` | No | - | - |

| [`sellerInformation`](#kind-offer-spec-sellerinformation) | OfferSellerInformation defines nested fields for Offer.SellerInformation. | `object` | No | - | - |
| `timeAcceptBy` | The time the Offer must be accepted by the Buyer before the Offer becomes invalid. An RFC3339 formatted datetime string | `string` | No | - | - |
| `timeStartDate` | The time the Offer will become active after it has been accepted by the Buyer. An RFC3339 formatted datetime string | `string` | No | - | - |
